task_completion.description: GMAT script is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI, text editor, or terminal showing a file saved at `~/Documents/missions/stationkeeping.script`.

task_completion.description: Force model is configured exactly as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT GUI Force Model dialog or script text showing Earth gravity degree/order >= 12, Sun and Moon added as point masses, SRP enabled, and Drag disabled.

task_completion.description: The orbit is propagated for exactly 30 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GMAT Propagate command dialog or script text showing the stopping condition as ElapsedDays = 30.

task_completion.description: The final stationkeeping budget report is created with the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing the file `~/GMAT_output/stationkeeping_budget.txt` containing the exact 6 keys: INC_growth_rate_degperyear, LON_drift_rate_degperyear, LON_drift_direction, NS_deltav_msperyear, EW_deltav_msperyear, total_deltav_msperyear.

task_completion.description: The report contains calculated numerical values and a valid direction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report file shows specific numerical values for the rates and delta-Vs, and either 'Eastward' or 'Westward' for the drift direction.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GMAT application to run the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: GMAT application window is visible, showing the script being edited, configured, or executed, and output messages indicating a successful run.

integrity.description: The agent performed calculations to extrapolate the annual rates and delta-V from the 30-day data.
integrity.visual_evidence: A calculator, Python terminal, spreadsheet, or script is visible being used to process the 30-day simulation data.

integrity.description: The agent read the GMAT simulation output before creating the final report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens and views the GMAT ReportFile or output data containing the 30-day inclination and longitude history.
